mapper.insert: INSERT INTO person_daily_attendance ( stat_date, person_id, camera_id, first_enter_at, enter_count, attendance_status, is_attended, current_session_id, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{statDate}, #{personId}, #{cameraId}, #{eventTime}, 1, 'present', TRUE, #{sessionId}, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (stat_date, person_id) DO UPDATE SET camera_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.camera_id, person_daily_attendance.camera_id), first_enter_at = LEAST(person_daily_attendance.first_enter_at, EXCLUDED.first_enter_at), enter_count = person_daily_attendance.enter_count + 1, attendance_status = 'present', is_attended = TRUE, current_session_id = EXCLUDED.current_session_id, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE person_daily_attendance SET last_exit_at = GREATEST(COALESCE(last_exit_at, #{eventTime}), #{eventTime}), total_dwell_seconds = total_dwell_seconds + COALESCE(#{dwellSeconds}, 0), attendance_status = 'left', current_session_id = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE stat_date = #{statDate} AND person_id = #{personId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM persons WHERE person_type IN ('student', 'staff')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM person_daily_attendance pda INNER JOIN persons p ON p.id = pda.person_id WHERE pda.stat_date = #{statDate} AND pda.is_attended = TRUE
AND p.person_type IN ('student', 'staff')
AND p.person_type = 'stranger'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ps.person_id) FROM presence_sessions ps INNER JOIN persons p ON p.id = ps.person_id WHERE ps.status = 'open' AND ps.person_id IS NOT NULL
AND p.person_type = 'stranger'
AND p.person_type IN ('student', 'staff')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM persons WHERE person_type = 'stranger'

SELECT stat_date::text AS statDate, total_registry_count AS totalRegistryCount, attended_count AS attendedCount, attendance_rate AS attendanceRate, stranger_total_count AS strangerTotalCount FROM attendance_daily_stats WHERE stat_date = #{statDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_daily_stats ( stat_date, total_registry_count, attended_count, attendance_rate, stranger_total_count, computed_at ) VALUES ( #{statDate}, #{totalRegistry}, #{attendedCount}, #{attendanceRate}, #{strangerTotal}, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (stat_date) DO UPDATE SET total_registry_count = EXCLUDED.total_registry_count, attended_count = EXCLUDED.attended_count, attendance_rate = EXCLUDED.attendance_rate, stranger_total_count = EXCLUDED.stranger_total_count, computed_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE person_daily_attendance SET person_id = #{toPersonId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE person_id = #{fromPersonId}
